coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:12. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/4. 6:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/4. 6:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 6:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 6:00 at 100%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 6min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 82-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 6:00 at 100%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 18 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 2/4.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 21min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 47% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 57% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 15 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 29 minutes in. 100% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 57% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 57% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 69% done. 0 intervals left. 10 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 35 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 6:00 at 100%. Then 4min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 6:00 at 100%. Then 4min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 4min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 6:00 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 90% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
